scripts.build:watch: nodemon --watch js --watch css --exec npm run build
scripts.build:site:dist: npm run build:geo:dist && npm run normalize:public-html:dist && npm run update:footer:dist && npm run build:dist && npm run build:search-index:dist && npm run build:sitemap:dist && npm run build:llms && npm run build:llms-full && npm run validate:pages:dist
scripts.test:regressions: node tests/image-template-regressions.test.js && node tests/image-loading-policy.test.js && node tests/geo-generator-regressions.test.js && node tests/public-html-regressions.test.js && node tests/widget-loader-regressions.test.js && node tests/footer-widget-loader-regressions.test.js && node tests/security-and-legal-regressions.test.js && node tests/build-pipeline-regressions.test.js && node tests/header-verifier-regressions.test.js && node tests/seo-regressions.test.js && node tests/priority-content-regressions.test.js && node tests/entity-claim-corpus-regressions.test.js && node tests/internal-linking-regressions.test.js && node tests/pseo-governance-regressions.test.js && node tests/seo-governance-report.test.js && node tests/lcp-hero-regressions.test.js
scripts.ci:quality: npm run build:geo && npm run normalize:public-html && npm run update:footer && npm run build && npm run build:search-index && npm run build:sitemap && npm run validate:pages && npm run test:regressions && npm run test:seo-smoke && npm run test:api
scripts.ci:quality:dist: npm run build:site:dist && npm run test:regressions && npm run test:seo-smoke && npm run test:api
